song.title: Light the Fire
song.author: Bill Maxwell, others
song.lyrics:
[V1] . G Bm I stand to praise You . C D But I fall down on my knees. . G Bm My spirit is willing . C D But my flesh is so weak. .G Bm I now surrender . C D And Your work in me begins. . G Bm You breathe life into me . C D D7 Like a mighty rushing wind.
[C] . C So light the fire... Light the fire .G D In my soul... In my weary soul . C Fan the flame... Fan the flame .G D Make me whole... Make my spirit whole . C Lord You know... Lord You know .G D Where I am... Where I’ve been
. C D G Em So light the fire in my heart again… . C D G Light the fire in my heart again.
